message:
Add tensor autograd introspection API and benchmark regression gate

Major autograd API surface expansion providing PyTorch-compatible
tensor gradient introspection and lifecycle control. New public APIs:
tensor_requires_grad, tensor_is_leaf, tensor_grad_fn (read state),
tensor_requires_grad_ (in-place toggle on leaves), tensor_detach_
(in-place graph detach converting non-leaf to leaf),
tensor_register_hook/tensor_remove_hook (gradient callbacks during
backward pass). All APIs include comprehensive test coverage for
round-trip toggle, non-leaf rejection, detach semantics, freeze/unfreeze
gradient flow, no_grad scope interaction, and hook ordering.

- crates/ft-api/src/lib.rs: +351 lines — 7 new public methods + 306
  lines of tests covering all gradient introspection edge cases
- crates/ft-autograd/src/lib.rs: +369 lines — backing implementations
  for requires_grad tracking, leaf detection, grad_fn naming, in-place
  detach, and hook registry with TensorHookHandle type
- crates/ft-conformance/fixtures/dispatch_key_cases.json: +211 lines
  of new dispatch key test vectors
- crates/ft-conformance/src/lib.rs: +222 lines of conformance harness
  updates for new dispatch key coverage
- crates/ft-conformance/src/bin/check_benchmark_regression.rs: new
  benchmark regression gate binary for CI performance checks

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
